name: Security & Password Tools
description: Privacy-first, in-browser tools for passwords, hashing, encryption and key generation.

tools.name: Password Generator
tools.description: Generate strong random passwords with adjustable length and character sets.

tools.name: Password Strength Checker
tools.description: Estimate password strength and crack time in the browser.

tools.name: MD5 Hash Generator
tools.description: Compute the MD5 hash of any input text.

tools.name: SHA-256 Hash Generator
tools.description: Generate SHA-256 hashes via the Web Crypto API.

tools.name: SHA-1 Hash Generator
tools.description: Compute SHA-1 hashes for text input.

tools.name: SHA-512 Hash Generator
tools.description: Generate SHA-512 hashes for text.

tools.name: Bcrypt Generator
tools.description: Hash passwords with bcrypt and verify them, with adjustable rounds.

tools.name: Bulk Password Generator
tools.description: Generate many strong passwords at once for export.

tools.name: Passphrase Generator
tools.description: Build memorable Diceware-style word passphrases.

tools.name: AES Text Encrypt/Decrypt
tools.description: Encrypt and decrypt text with AES-GCM and a passphrase, fully client-side.

tools.name: HMAC Generator
tools.description: Compute HMAC signatures with a chosen hash and secret key.

tools.name: htpasswd Generator
tools.description: Create Apache/Nginx htpasswd entries with bcrypt or APR1.

tools.name: Secure UUID Generator
tools.description: Generate cryptographically secure v4 UUIDs.

tools.name: API Key Generator
tools.description: Generate random API keys and secret tokens.

tools.name: Random Token Generator
tools.description: Produce secure random tokens of configurable length and charset.

tools.name: TOTP / 2FA Code Generator
tools.description: Generate time-based OTP codes from a secret for 2FA testing.

tools.name: Hash Identifier
tools.description: Detect the likely hash algorithm from a given hash string.

tools.name: CRC32 Checksum Generator
tools.description: Compute CRC32 checksums for text or data.

tools.name: Base64 Hash Generator
tools.description: Hash input and output the digest in Base64 form.

tools.name: PIN Generator
tools.description: Generate random numeric PIN codes of chosen length.

tools.name: WiFi QR Code Generator
tools.description: Create a QR code that shares WiFi credentials for easy connection.

tools.name: CSRF Token Generator
tools.description: Generate random anti-CSRF tokens for forms.

tools.name: NTLM Hash Generator
tools.description: Compute NTLM hashes from password input.

tools.name: Encryption Key Generator
tools.description: Generate random AES keys in 128/192/256-bit lengths.

tools.name: Caesar Cipher Tool
tools.description: Encrypt and decrypt text using a shift-based Caesar cipher.

tools.name: ROT47 Encoder/Decoder
tools.description: Apply the ROT47 substitution cipher to text.

tools.name: Password Entropy Calculator
tools.description: Calculate the bits of entropy in a password.

tools.name: Salt Generator
tools.description: Generate random cryptographic salts in hex or Base64.

tools.name: Argon2 Hash Generator
tools.description: Hash passwords with Argon2id, with tunable parameters.

tools.name: JWT Signature Verifier
tools.description: Verify a JWT signature against a provided secret or key.
